attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
  XAAS.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
  XAAS.MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  
 /*,XAAS.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_ENTERPRISE_INV_SKU_ID
 ,COALESCE(NSOL.SALES_MOTION_CD,'UNKNOWN' ) AS SALES_MOTION_CD */
 ,CASE WHEN DRVD.ACQUISITION_ROLE = 'Y' THEN DRVD.DV_PRODUCT_KEY ELSE XAAS.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY END AS DV_ENTERPRISE_INV_SKU_ID 	 	 
 ,COALESCE(XAAS.SALES_MOTION_CD,'UNKNOWN' ) AS SALES_MOTION_CD
 ,1.000000 AS DV_ALLOCATION_PCT 
 ,'TS' AS DV_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CD
 ,'N' AS DV_OA_FLG     
 ,XAAS.START_TV_DTM AS START_TV_DTM
 ,XAAS.END_TV_DTM AS END_TV_DTM
 /*,'NON-RTNR' AS DV_SOURCE_TYPE*/
 ,CASE WHEN DRVD.ACQUISITION_ROLE = 'Y' THEN 'NONRTR-ACQ' ELSE 'NON-RTNR' END AS DV_SOURCE_TYPE
 ,'UNKNOWN' AS AS_ARCHITECTURE_NAME
 ,'UNKNOWN' AS TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID
 ,'UNKNOWN' AS ATTR_PRDT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME
 ,'UNK' AS AS_TS_CODE
 , -999 AS SK_RENEW_CONTRACT_LINE_ID
 , -999 AS SK_AS_PARENT_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
 , -9999 AS SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
 , 'UNKNOWN' AS PRODUCT_CLASS,
-999 AS TRANSACTION_CR_PARTY_KEY,
-999 AS HQ_CR_PRTY_KEY,
'UNKNOWN' AS RENEWAL_REF_ID,
'UNKNOWN' AS RENEWAL_REF_CD,
'UNKNOWN' AS SMR_TAGGING_FAILURE_RSN_CD,
COALESCE(NSOL.SALES_MOTION_TIMING_NAME,'UNKNOWN' ) AS SALES_MOTION_TIMING_CD,
-999 AS OFFER_ATTRIB_PRDT_KEY
FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBCR_ITM_STRX_NRT_TV XAAS
LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE WHERE SS_CODE = 'OPL')NSOL
ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = XAAS.MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY
AND NSOL.END_TV_DATETIME = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
/* Changed as part SMC Changes in Sep26th Nano Release */	 	 
LEFT JOIN (SELECT DRVD_SUB.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY, DRVD_SUB.DV_PRODUCT_KEY, DRVD_SUB.ACQUISITION_ROLE	 	 
FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.MT_DRVD_XAAS_BKGS_TRX_NRT DRVD_SUB WHERE DRVD_SUB.DV_LATEST_RECORD_FLG = 'Y' GROUP BY 1, 2, 3) DRVD	 	 
ON XAAS.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY = DRVD.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY	
WHERE XAAS.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > '$$LastExtractDate' 
AND CAST(XAAS.END_TV_DTM AS DATE) =  CAST( '3500-01-01' AS DATE) 
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_ATTR_PRDT_NEW_RNWL_ACV ATT WHERE ATT.SK_ERP_BKGS_TRX_ID = XAAS.SK_TRX_ID_INT )
/* Changing N_ATTR_PRDT_AS_NEW_OR_RNWL to N_ATTR_PRDT_NEW_RNWL_ACV as part of Aug 16th release */
AND NOT EXISTS ( SEL 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_MT_XAAS_SMC_ATTRIB_NRTR NRTR 
					WHERE XAAS.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY = NRTR.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY ) /* Added as part of nov 2020 SW SMR release to avoid alredy loaded trx ids from previous pipelines */

SELECT SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
	   SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
       DV_ENTERPRISE_INV_SKU_ID,
       SALES_MOTION_CD,
       DV_ALLOCATION_PCT,
       DV_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CD,
       DV_OA_FLG,
       START_TV_DTM,
       END_TV_DTM,
       DV_SOURCE_TYPE,
	   AS_ARCHITECTURE_NAME,
	   TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID,
	   ATTR_PRDT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME,
	   AS_TS_CODE,
	   SK_RENEW_CONTRACT_LINE_ID,
	   SK_AS_PARENT_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID,
	   SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
       CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
       USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
       CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
       USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
	   PRODUCT_CLASS,
TRANSACTION_CR_PARTY_KEY,
HQ_CR_PRTY_KEY,
RENEWAL_REF_ID,
RENEWAL_REF_CD,
SMR_TAGGING_FAILURE_RSN_CD,
SALES_MOTION_TIMING_CD,
OFFER_ATTRIB_PRDT_KEY
FROM $$STGDB.WI_MT_XAAS_SMC_ATTRIB_NRTR WI
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_XAAS_SLS_MOTION_ATTRIB MT
                   WHERE WI.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY = MT.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
                    AND WI.DV_ENTERPRISE_INV_SKU_ID = MT.DV_ENTERPRISE_INV_SKU_ID
                    AND WI.START_TV_DTM = MT.START_TV_DTM
                   -- AND MT.DV_SOURCE_TYPE = 'RTNR' /* To allow all kinds of version changes */
                  )

/* AR lines OA ID level tagging for those OPL/ORDER RTR lines having OA ID level tagging */
SELECT
  XAAS_AR_ATTRIBUTED_INCR.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
  XAAS_AR_ATTRIBUTED_INCR.MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  
 ,XAAS_AR_ATTRIBUTED_INCR.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_ENTERPRISE_INV_SKU_ID 	 	 
 ,COALESCE(REF_OPL_OA.SALES_MOTION_CD,'UNKNOWN' ) AS SALES_MOTION_CD
 ,REF_OPL_OA.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT 
 ,REF_OPL_OA.DV_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CD
 ,REF_OPL_OA.DV_OA_FLG     
 ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS START_TV_DTM
 ,'3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS END_TV_DTM
 ,'NRTR-AR' AS DV_SOURCE_TYPE
 ,REF_OPL_OA.AS_ARCHITECTURE_NAME
 ,REF_OPL_OA.TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID
 ,REF_OPL_OA.ATTR_PRDT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME
 ,REF_OPL_OA.AS_TS_CD
 , REF_OPL_OA.SK_RENEW_CONTRACT_LINE_ID
 , REF_OPL_OA.SK_AS_PARENT_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
 , XAAS_AR_ATTRIBUTED_INCR.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
 , REF_OPL_OA.PRODUCT_CLASS,
REF_OPL_OA.TRANSACTION_CR_PARTY_KEY,
REF_OPL_OA.HQ_CR_PRTY_KEY,
REF_OPL_OA.RENEWAL_REF_ID,
REF_OPL_OA.RENEWAL_REF_CD,
REF_OPL_OA.SMR_TAGGING_FAILURE_RSN_CD,
'UNKNOWN' AS SALES_MOTION_TIMING_CD,
-999 AS OFFER_ATTRIB_PRDT_KEY
FROM
( SELECT WEB_ORDER_ID, DV_LINE_REF_NUM_INT, XOA.SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT, SK_TRX_ID_INT,XAAS.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY, MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY,
SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY, XOA.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBCR_ITM_STRX_NRT_TV XAAS
INNER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCRPTN_ATTRBTN_NRT XOA
ON XAAS.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY = XOA.PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY 
AND XOA.ATTRIBUTION_CD = 'ATTRIBUTED'
WHERE XAAS.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > '$$LastExtractDate' 
AND CAST(XAAS.END_TV_DTM AS DATE) =  CAST( '3500-01-01' AS DATE) 
AND XAAS.TRX_SS_CD = 'AR'
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_ATTR_PRDT_NEW_RNWL_ACV ATT WHERE ATT.SK_ERP_BKGS_TRX_ID = XAAS.SK_TRX_ID_INT )

UNION

SELECT WEB_ORDER_ID, DV_LINE_REF_NUM_INT, XOA.SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT, SK_TRX_ID_INT, XAAS.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY, MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY, 
SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY, XOA.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBCR_ITM_STRX_NRT_TV XAAS
INNER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCRPTN_ATTRBTN_NRT XOA
ON XAAS.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY = XOA.PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY 
AND XOA.ATTRIBUTION_CD = 'ATTRIBUTED' 
WHERE CAST(XAAS.END_TV_DTM AS DATE) =  CAST( '3500-01-01' AS DATE) 
AND XAAS.TRX_SS_CD = 'AR'
AND EXISTS ( SEL 1 
			 FROM ( SEL XAAS.WEB_ORDER_ID, XAAS.DV_LINE_REF_NUM_INT 
					FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBCR_ITM_STRX_NRT_TV XAAS
					WHERE CAST(XAAS.END_TV_DTM AS DATE) =  CAST( '3500-01-01' AS DATE)
                      AND XAAS.TRX_SS_CD IN ( 'ORDER', 'OPL' )
                      AND XAAS.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY IN ( SEL SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_MT_XAAS_SMC_ATTRIB_RTR ) 
					  ) REFER
			 WHERE REFER.WEB_ORDER_ID = XAAS.WEB_ORDER_ID
			   AND REFER.DV_LINE_REF_NUM_INT = XAAS.DV_LINE_REF_NUM_INT
		   )
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_ATTR_PRDT_NEW_RNWL_ACV ATT WHERE ATT.SK_ERP_BKGS_TRX_ID = XAAS.SK_TRX_ID_INT )
) XAAS_AR_ATTRIBUTED_INCR
INNER JOIN (
SEL TRX.WEB_ORDER_ID, TRX.DV_LINE_REF_NUM_INT, XOA.SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT, MT_XAAS_RTR.*
 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_XAAS_SLS_MOTION_ATTRIB MT_XAAS_RTR
INNER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBCR_ITM_STRX_NRT_TV TRX
ON TRX.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY = MT_XAAS_RTR.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
INNER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCRPTN_ATTRBTN_NRT XOA
ON MT_XAAS_RTR.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY = XOA.PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY
AND MT_XAAS_RTR.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT = XOA.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
AND TRX.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND MT_XAAS_RTR.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
WHERE MT_XAAS_RTR.DV_SOURCE_TYPE = 'RTNR'
AND EXISTS ( SEL 1 FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBCR_ITM_STRX_NRT_TV XAAS_AR
WHERE XAAS_AR.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND TRX.DV_LINE_REF_NUM_INT = XAAS_AR.DV_LINE_REF_NUM_INT
AND TRX.WEB_ORDER_ID = XAAS_AR.WEB_ORDER_ID
AND TRX_SS_CD = 'AR' )
AND MT_XAAS_RTR.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT > 0
AND TRX.TRX_SS_CD IN ( 'ORDER', 'OPL' )
) REF_OPL_OA
ON XAAS_AR_ATTRIBUTED_INCR.WEB_ORDER_ID = REF_OPL_OA.WEB_ORDER_ID
AND XAAS_AR_ATTRIBUTED_INCR.DV_LINE_REF_NUM_INT = REF_OPL_OA.DV_LINE_REF_NUM_INT
AND XAAS_AR_ATTRIBUTED_INCR.SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT = REF_OPL_OA.SK_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT

/* Remaining all Attributed/Standalone AR XAAS lines to get inheritance from TRX ID level ORDER/OPL lines */
SELECT
  XAAS_AR_INCR.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,
  XAAS_AR_INCR.MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  
 ,XAAS_AR_INCR.SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY AS DV_ENTERPRISE_INV_SKU_ID 	 	 
 ,COALESCE(REF_OPL.SALES_MOTION_CD,'UNKNOWN' ) AS SALES_MOTION_CD
 ,REF_OPL.DV_ALLOCATION_PCT 
 ,REF_OPL.DV_SERVICE_CATEGORY_CD
 ,REF_OPL.DV_OA_FLG     
 ,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS START_TV_DTM
 ,'3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS END_TV_DTM
 ,'NRTR-AR' AS DV_SOURCE_TYPE
 ,REF_OPL.AS_ARCHITECTURE_NAME
 ,REF_OPL.TECHNOLOGY_GROUP_ID
 ,REF_OPL.ATTR_PRDT_OFFER_TYPE_NAME
 ,REF_OPL.AS_TS_CD
 , REF_OPL.SK_RENEW_CONTRACT_LINE_ID
 , REF_OPL.SK_AS_PARENT_INVENTORY_ITEM_ID
 , XAAS_AR_INCR.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT   
 , REF_OPL.PRODUCT_CLASS,
REF_OPL.TRANSACTION_CR_PARTY_KEY,
REF_OPL.HQ_CR_PRTY_KEY,
REF_OPL.RENEWAL_REF_ID,
REF_OPL.RENEWAL_REF_CD,
REF_OPL.SMR_TAGGING_FAILURE_RSN_CD,
'UNKNOWN' AS SALES_MOTION_TIMING_CD,
-999 AS OFFER_ATTRIB_PRDT_KEY
FROM
( SELECT WEB_ORDER_ID, DV_LINE_REF_NUM_INT
, SK_TRX_ID_INT,XAAS.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY, MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY,
SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY, COALESCE( XOA.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT, -9999 ) BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBCR_ITM_STRX_NRT_TV XAAS
LEFT JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCRPTN_ATTRBTN_NRT XOA
ON XAAS.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY = XOA.PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY 
AND XOA.ATTRIBUTION_CD = 'ATTRIBUTED'
WHERE XAAS.EDW_UPDATE_DTM > '$$LastExtractDate' 
AND CAST(XAAS.END_TV_DTM AS DATE) =  CAST( '3500-01-01' AS DATE) 
AND XAAS.TRX_SS_CD = 'AR'
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_ATTR_PRDT_NEW_RNWL_ACV ATT WHERE ATT.SK_ERP_BKGS_TRX_ID = XAAS.SK_TRX_ID_INT )

UNION

SELECT WEB_ORDER_ID, DV_LINE_REF_NUM_INT, SK_TRX_ID_INT, XAAS.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY, MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY, 
SUBSCRIPTION_PRODUCT_KEY, COALESCE(XOA.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT, -9999 ) AS BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT
FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBCR_ITM_STRX_NRT_TV XAAS
LEFT JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCRPTN_ATTRBTN_NRT XOA
ON XAAS.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY = XOA.PARENT_SO_SBSCRP_ITMSLSTRX_KEY 
AND XOA.ATTRIBUTION_CD = 'ATTRIBUTED' 
WHERE CAST(XAAS.END_TV_DTM AS DATE) =  CAST( '3500-01-01' AS DATE) 
AND XAAS.TRX_SS_CD = 'AR'
AND EXISTS ( SEL 1 
			 FROM ( SEL XAAS.WEB_ORDER_ID, XAAS.DV_LINE_REF_NUM_INT 
					FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBCR_ITM_STRX_NRT_TV XAAS
					WHERE CAST(XAAS.END_TV_DTM AS DATE) =  CAST( '3500-01-01' AS DATE)
                      AND XAAS.TRX_SS_CD IN ( 'ORDER', 'OPL' )
                      AND XAAS.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY IN ( SEL SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY FROM $$STGDB.WI_MT_XAAS_SMC_ATTRIB_RTR ) 
					  ) REFER
			 WHERE REFER.WEB_ORDER_ID = XAAS.WEB_ORDER_ID
			   AND REFER.DV_LINE_REF_NUM_INT = XAAS.DV_LINE_REF_NUM_INT
		   )
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_ATTR_PRDT_NEW_RNWL_ACV ATT WHERE ATT.SK_ERP_BKGS_TRX_ID = XAAS.SK_TRX_ID_INT )
) XAAS_AR_INCR
INNER JOIN (
SEL TRX.WEB_ORDER_ID, TRX.DV_LINE_REF_NUM_INT, MT_XAAS_RTR.*
 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_XAAS_SLS_MOTION_ATTRIB MT_XAAS_RTR
INNER JOIN $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBCR_ITM_STRX_NRT_TV TRX
ON TRX.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY = MT_XAAS_RTR.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
AND TRX.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND MT_XAAS_RTR.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
WHERE MT_XAAS_RTR.DV_SOURCE_TYPE = 'RTNR'
AND EXISTS ( SEL 1 FROM $$NRTNCRVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBCR_ITM_STRX_NRT_TV XAAS_AR
WHERE XAAS_AR.END_TV_DTM = '3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND TRX.DV_LINE_REF_NUM_INT = XAAS_AR.DV_LINE_REF_NUM_INT
AND TRX.WEB_ORDER_ID = XAAS_AR.WEB_ORDER_ID
AND TRX_SS_CD = 'AR' )
AND MT_XAAS_RTR.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT < 0
AND TRX.TRX_SS_CD IN ( 'ORDER', 'OPL' )
QUALIFY RANK() OVER ( PARTITION BY TRX.WEB_ORDER_ID, TRX.DV_LINE_REF_NUM_INT ORDER BY TRX.TRX_SS_CD, TRX.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY, MT_XAAS_RTR.DV_ENTERPRISE_INV_SKU_ID ASC ) = 1
) REF_OPL
ON XAAS_AR_INCR.WEB_ORDER_ID = REF_OPL.WEB_ORDER_ID
AND XAAS_AR_INCR.DV_LINE_REF_NUM_INT = REF_OPL.DV_LINE_REF_NUM_INT
AND NOT EXISTS ( SEL 1 FROM $$STGDB.WI_MT_XAAS_SMC_ATTRIB_NRTR NRTR 
					WHERE XAAS_AR_INCR.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY = NRTR.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY )
